markschemeHtml:
decrease the significance level          A2

 

Note: Award A1 if type I error has been defined (e.g. As rejecting H0 when H0 is true) but correct answer not seen.

Increased sample size is incorrect.

If more than one answer is given, mark only the first one.

[2 marks]
